title: HR Manager (Construction)
description:
Job description:

Human Resources

  • Oversee and manage the full spectrum of HR functions including recruitment, onboarding, payroll, performance management, employee relations, and offboarding

  • Develop, implement, and review HR policies and procedures in compliance with Singapore labour laws and MOM regulations

  • Advise management on HR matters, manpower planning, and organizational development

Recruitment & Manpower Planning

  • Manage end-to-end recruitment for office, site

  • Coordinate with recruitment agencies and subcontractors for manpower sourcing

  • Manage worker housing, dormitory arrangements, and welfare matters

Payroll & Compensation

  • Oversee monthly payroll processing

  • Ensure accurate payroll reporting and compliance with statutory requirements

  • Administer employee benefits, leave management, and insurance matters

Training & Development

  • Coordinate training programs including WSH, safety, and skills upgrading

  • Manage training grants and submissions where applicable (e.g. BCA / SkillsFuture)

  • Maintain training records and certification tracking

HR Administration & Reporting

  • Maintain accurate employee records and HR documentation

  • Prepare HR reports on manpower, turnover, payroll, and compliance

  • Support management with HR-related data analysis and planning

Requirements:

  • Degree or Diploma in Human Resources, Business Administration, or related field

  • Minimum 5–8 years of HR experience, preferably in the construction industry

HOW TO APPLY:

Interested applicants, kindly send your resume in MS WORD format or please click on “Apply Now”.

We regret only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Important Note: Trust Recruit Pte Ltd is committed to safeguarding your personal data in accordance with the Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA).

Please read our privacy statement on our corporate website.

Trust Recruit Pte Ltd

EA License No: 19C9950

EA Personnel: Tan Sin Yong (Stella)

EA Personnel Reg No: R24124127

postedCompany.description:
Trust Recruit is Singapore’s leading relationship-based human resource and recruitment firm.


With more than 20 years of collective consulting experience, we provide personalized workforce solutions for our corporate clients, ranging from multinational corporations to the public sector, as well as small and medium enterprises.


At Trust Recruit, integrity and reliability permeate every level of our recruitment process.


TRUST is our currency of interactions; be it with our valued clients, talented job-seekers, or our own employees. Through our premium staffing services, we are committed to connecting and developing quality relationships between candidates and companies.
postedCompany.name: TRUST RECRUIT PTE. LTD.
